name: Evie's Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped pecans, walnuts, dates, cherry pieces (reserve a few whole for decoration), pineapple chunks, sweetened condensed milk, and shredded coconut in a large bowl.
2. Mix all ingredients together with your hands until well combined.
3. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 225°F (107°C) for about 1 1/2 hours, or until no milk oozes out when pressed with a finger.
6. Decorate the cooled cake with the reserved cherries if desired.
7. Turn the cake onto foil and wrap it snugly.
8. Store in the refrigerator or freezer for up to one month before serving.
